2150770.name: Rodent Retribution
2150770.description:
You were happy once. Now all is lost. It’s their turn to bleed.

Rodent Retribution is a savage, high-velocity, Doom-inspired FPS soaked in fur, blood, and vengeance. You’re a cat forged in loss and rage, clawing your way through the rotting underbelly of a world infested with vermin. No side quests. No mercy. Just guns, guts, and grim determination.

Key Features:

▪ BRUTAL RAT SLAUGHTER
This isn’t pest control, it’s a goddamn massacre. Tear through twisted rodent freaks in relentless firefights that never let up. Each rat type fights dirty and dies messier.

▪ SCRAP-BUILT FIREPOWER
Your guns? Jury-rigged from trash, bone, and rage.
With Calcifer, a gruff, battle-scarred sewer cat, you’ll forge weapons from the waste around you. Upgrade them into instruments of absolute overkill.

▪ SEWER SYSTEMS FROM HELL
Descend into a rotting labyrinth of corroded pipes, flooded chambers, and death traps.
Lucky for you, S’mores, a clever, sharp-tongued stray, knows the tunnels better than anyone. She’ll guide you, but not for nothing.

▪ FERAL FELINE ABILITIES
You’re not just some ordinary house cat. You’re a predator. As you fight, you’ll unlock raw, primal abilities that make you faster, stronger, and more dangerous. Leap impossible gaps, strike from above, and tear your enemies to pieces with unmatched agility and power.

▪ A REVENGE STORY WRITTEN IN BLOOD
You had someone. They took her.
This isn't a rescue mission, this is a reckoning. Uncover the truth, or burn it all down. Either way, the rats will pay.

▪ ADAPTIVE METAL SOUNDTRACK
Dynamic, bone-crushing metal that reacts to every bloodbath. When the action escalates, so does the fury in your ears.
2150770.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
